empty.waitingUsageData: No data, waiting for usage data...

errors.operationTimeout: Operation timed out, Gateway may not support this action

connectionSetup.title: Choose the ClawNexus connection mode
connectionSetup.description: On first launch, choose which Gateway the local Node proxy should forward to. The browser still connects only through /gateway-ws.
connectionSetup.syncing: Applying connection settings and preparing the proxy...
connectionSetup.footer: Local mode resets to the Office Server default Gateway. Remote mode accepts a full access link and can auto-extract the token.

local.title: Local Gateway
local.description: Use the Strategic Nexus default local Gateway and keep the original startup behavior.

remote.title: Remote Gateway
remote.description: Forward through the local Node proxy to a remote Gateway, including Aliyun-hosted services.
remote.gatewayUrlHint: You can paste a full access link such as http(s)://host/path?token=...
remote.gatewayTokenHint: If the URL does not include a token, enter it here.
remote.gatewayTokenExtracted: Token detected from the access link. You can still override it manually.

validation.gatewayUrlRequired: Enter the remote Gateway access URL.
